notes: 2026-05-11 post-fix refresh: P0 dashboard API tile tri-state, simulations progressive sweep UI, reports/layout hydration guards — see git diff (branch dirty).
Dev servers verified via curl: Flask :5000, Next :3000 (./scripts/dev.sh). Alternate Next port 3042 via scripts/run-next-web.sh / NEXT_WEB_PORT was not used in this run.
web/.env.local key names observed (values omitted): API_PROXY_TARGET, NEXT_PUBLIC_API_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL, VERCEL_OIDC_TOKEN. Flask API_KEY is server-side only.
Next route web/src/app/api/[[...path]]/route.ts proxies to Flask when clients call same-origin /api/*; dev.sh uses next.config rewrites to :5000 instead.
Next route web/src/app/health/route.ts returns JSON liveness for load balancers (not audited as an operator page).
P1 (2026-05): manual_flows[] exercises IBM simulator smoke (when pool allows), async job, walk-forward, PDF export (WeasyPrint), Tiingo prerequisite. Repo root TIINGO_API_KEY present=no.
Port :3042 validation used `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL="" npm run build` then `next start -p 3042` (a second `next dev` on the same repo is blocked while dev.sh owns :3000 — see Next singleton lock).
curl GET /api/health on :3042 with X-API-Key + X-Tenant-Id confirms request-time proxy to Flask (:5000).

next_server_routes.role: Runtime reverse-proxy from Next to Flask (API_PROXY_TARGET or Fly internal DNS); forwards X-API-Key and X-Tenant-Id.
GET returns {status: ok} for platform liveness.

orphaned_client_api_helpers: streamRun in web/src/lib/api.ts — backend GET /api/runs/{id}/stream exists but no web/src importer found
unsafe_or_manual_e2e: Heavy UI clicks not covered by curl smokes (e.g. Optimize from Reports UI, destructive tenant/IBM clears, hardware IBM smoke, full six-scenario simulations wait).

P1 automated coverage: POST /api/jobs/optimize + poll (pass), POST /api/backtest/walkforward (pass via yfinance), GET report PDF after completed run (pass), IBM simulator smoke infra-limited (pass-with-warnings), Tiingo market path blocked pending TIINGO_API_KEY.
`next dev` singleton: cannot run `./scripts/run-next-web.sh` alongside `./scripts/dev.sh`; :3042 used `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL="" npm run build` then `next start -p 3042`.

manual_flows.label: IBM Quantum Runtime simulator smoke-test
prerequisites: Stored IBM token for tenant (POST /api/config/ibm-quantum or Settings UI)
Operational IBM simulator backend with >=8 qubits in account pool

checks.evidence: HTTP 502 IBM_SMOKE_TEST_FAILED — No operational IBM simulator backend with ≥8 qubit(s) (tenant had IBM configured; pool constraint). Retry when a suitable simulator backend is available.

issues: IBM simulator pool had no qualifying backend — not an app-layer regression.

checks.evidence: HTTP 202 job_id=267230f0-dd29-4788-89e5-bff7e26d79b5; polled to terminal=completed; result included holdings/opt payload keys.

manual_flows.label: Walk-forward backtest (small window)
prerequisites: Flask DATA_PROVIDER resolves price history (Tiingo when TIINGO_API_KEY set else yfinance)

checks.evidence: HTTP 200; metadata.n_periods=6; equity_curve.{dates,portfolio} non-empty dict; summary contained sharpe_ratio. data_source=yfinance (no TIINGO_API_KEY in root .env.local).

issues: Used yfinance for prices because TIINGO_API_KEY absent from repo root .env.local.
